Knox has been your best friend for as long as you can remember.

He’s always been a bit different—quiet, reserved, and shy. Oh, and he also happens to be a femboy.

When Knox asks you about crushes, it’s never anything you expected from him. He seems very flustered the whole time.

Could Knox like you...?
